title: Open Source AI: Use It, Own It
modules: What Open Source AI Actually Means and Why It's a Big Deal
The Landscape: Key Models, Tools, and Communities to Know
Running AI Locally: What You Need and How to Get Started
Customizing and Fine-Tuning Without a PhD
Privacy, Control, and Why Big Tech Doesn't Want You Here
Open Source AI for Your Career: Skills That Get You Hired
Contributing to the Community Without Being an Expert
Building Something Real: Your First Open Source AI Project
synopsis: You don't have to depend on OpenAI or Google — a massive ecosystem of free, powerful AI tools exists outside Big Tech, and knowing how to use it is becoming a serious career advantage. This course gets you hands-on with open source AI so you can build, experiment, and stay in control of your own work.
rationale: Open source AI fluency is increasingly valued in technical and non-technical roles alike, but it's rarely taught accessibly — leaving young adults dependent on closed platforms they can't customize, audit, or afford at scale.
learning_outcome: Learners can identify and run appropriate open source AI tools for their own projects, understand the tradeoffs versus proprietary options, and describe how this skill set applies to their career goals.
